---
# title: Pranjal Chatterjee
image: pranjal.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 18em
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: fab fa-linkedin-in
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pranjalchatterjee/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/pranjal-chatterjee
    - icon: fas fa-envelope
      text: Gmail
      href: mailto:chatpranjal@gmail.com
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/PranjalChatter1
---

:::{#hero-heading}
# **Pranjal Chatterjee**
Hello, I'm Pranjal, currently a PhD Scholar in Computer Science and Engineering at the [**Ubiquitous Networked Systems Lab (UbiNet)**](https://ubinet-iitkgp.github.io/ubinet/), IIT Kharagpur, West Bengal, under the guidance of [**Prof. Sandip Chakraborty**](https://sandipc-iitkgp.github.io/sandip-web/). My research interests lie broadly in the fields of millimeter-wave sensing, FMCW radars, human-computer interaction (HCI), and Machine Learning.
:::
---

## Background {#background}

### Education

- <strong style="color:var(--accent-blue)">PhD in Computer Science & Engineering</strong>  
  <a href="https://www.iiests.ac.in/" style="color:var(--muted)">Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur</a>  
  <span style="font-style:italic; color:var(--muted-2)">Jan 2026 - Present</span><br>

- <strong style="color:var(--accent-blue)">M.Tech in Information Technology</strong>  
  <a href="https://www.iiests.ac.in/" style="color:var(--muted)">Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology (IIEST), Shibpur</a>  
  <span style="font-style:italic; color:var(--muted-2)">Aug 2022 - June 2024</span><br>
  <span style="color:var(--muted)">CGPA: <strong>9.43</strong> &nbsp;|&nbsp; <em style="color:var(--accent-red)">Silver Medalist</em></span>

- <strong style="color:var(--accent-blue)">B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering</strong>  
  <a href="https://www.makautexam.net/" style="color:var(--muted)">Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (India)</a>  
  <span style="font-style:italic; color:var(--muted-2)">Sept 2018 - June 2022</span><br>
  <span style="color:var(--muted)">CGPA: <strong>9.46</strong></span>

### Research Interests

- mm-Wave Sensing
- Ubiquitous Computing
- Human-Computer Interaction (HCI)
- Machine Learning

## Experience {#experience}

<strong style="color:var(--accent-green)">
  <a href="https://www.iitkgp.ac.in" target="_blank" style="color:var(--accent-green); text-decoration:none;">
    Junior Research Fellow @ IIT Kharagpur
  </a>
</strong>  
<span style="font-style:italic; color:var(--muted-2)">July 2025 - Dec 2026</span>  
- Worked on a DST funded project called "mmMap : Indoor Multi-user Localization, Navigation and Mapping using mmWave Sensing".

<strong style="color:var(--accent-green)">
  <a href="https://www.arrisesolutions.com" target="_blank" style="color:var(--accent-green); text-decoration:none;">
    Junior Game Developer @ Arrise Solutions (India) Pvt. Ltd.
  </a>
</strong>  
<span style="font-style:italic; color:var(--muted-2)">July 2024 - June 2025</span>  
- Acquired hands-on experience in the gaming industry by designing, developing, and deploying custom light to medium-scale games tailored for the company's gaming platform.
